paneContent:
в”‚ assets/canvas/images/storyboard-demo--2026-05-17--00-33-34-oujl.png
  в”” 1 line read


в—Џ Check _app wrapper (shell)
  в”‚ cat src/prototypes/_app.jsx | head -50; echo "---"; cat src/prototypes/_app.module.css | head -30
  в”” 60 lines...


в—Џ I can see the issue вЂ” way too much vertical air between title, cards, toolbar, and charts. The gap-6 p-8 plus
  default h1 margin is stretching things out. Tightening up.


в—Џ Edit index.jsx +1 -1
  в”” src/prototypes/main.folder/SiloDashboard/index.jsx


в—Џ Edit index.jsx +1 -1
  в”” src/prototypes/main.folder/SiloDashboard/index.jsx


в—Џ Edit index.jsx +6 -4
  в”” src/prototypes/main.folder/SiloDashboard/index.jsx


в—Џ Edit index.jsx +1 -1
  в”” src/prototypes/main.folder/SiloDashboard/index.jsx


в—Џ Tightened: outer is now h-screen overflow-hidden (prevents the page from stretching to a huge canvas height),
  main scrolls internally, h1 has m-0 to kill browser default top/bottom margin, padding reduced to px-8 py-6,
  section gap gap-5, chart stack gap-3. The huge gaps should be gone вЂ” HMR will refresh the prototype widget.

 ~/workspace/storyboard-core/worktrees/0.6.0 [вЋ‡ 0.6.0*%]                                                @index.jsx
